event: large multi-septated abscess in segment VIII of liver
pus drained with 8.5 Fr pigtail catheter
electrocardiography ST elevation in leads V3-V6
decreased breath sounds at base of right lung
diffuse crackles in lower two-thirds of both lung fields
akinesia in mid- to distal portion of LV chamber
typical appearance of apical ballooning on echocardiography
systolic blood pressure dropped to 70 mmHg
hemodynamically stable after 5 days in ICU
persistent LV dysfunction on serial echocardiography 3 weeks later
no tissue hyperenhancement in dysfunctional apical regions
LV dysfunction slightly improved 5 weeks after admission
slightly improved contractility of mid-ventricular wall segment
